CustomField.description: 落札者が”その他”の場合は、落札者（手入力）を表示する。 落札金額はカンマ編集する。※小数点以下は切り捨て。
CustomField.formula: IF ( SuccessfulBidder__r.Name = "その他", SuccessfulBidderManual__c, SuccessfulBidder__r.Name) & "／" & IF( ROUND(BidAmount__c,0) < 1, TEXT(BidAmount__c), MID( TEXT(FLOOR(BidAmount__c)), 1, IF( MOD( LEN(TEXT(ROUND(BidAmount__c,0))),3)=0, 3, LEN(TEXT(ROUND(BidAmount__c,0)))-(ROUND((LEN(TEXT(ROUND(BidAmount__c,0)))-1)/3,0)*3) ) ) & IF( LEN(TEXT(ROUND(BidAmount__c,0)))>3, "," & MID( TEXT(FLOOR(BidAmount__c)), IF( MOD(LEN(TEXT(ROUND(BidAmount__c,0))),3)=0, 4, LEN(TEXT(ROUND(BidAmount__c,0)))-(ROUND((LEN(TEXT(ROUND(BidAmount__c,0)))-1)/3,0)*3-1) ), 3 ), "" ) & IF( LEN(TEXT(ROUND(BidAmount__c,0)))>6, "," & MID( TEXT(FLOOR(BidAmount__c)), IF( MOD(LEN(TEXT(ROUND(BidAmount__c,0))),3)=0, 7, LEN(TEXT(ROUND(BidAmount__c,0)))-(ROUND((LEN(TEXT(ROUND(BidAmount__c,0)))-1)/3,0)*3-4) ), 3 ), "" ) & IF( LEN(TEXT(ROUND(BidAmount__c,0)))>9, "," & MID( TEXT(FLOOR(BidAmount__c)), IF( MOD(LEN(TEXT(ROUND(BidAmount__c,0))),3)=0, 10, LEN(TEXT(ROUND(BidAmount__c,0)))-(ROUND((LEN(TEXT(ROUND(BidAmount__c,0)))-1)/3,0)*3-7) ), 3 ), "" ) )
CustomField.label: 落札者／落札金額
